plan.plan_summary: This 12-week plan prioritizes Generative AI, A/B Testing, and Experimentation, allocating significant time to build foundational knowledge. It strategically integrates Machine Learning, Causal Inference, R, Spark, ETL, and PyTorch in spare hours, leveraging adjacent skills to enhance overall competency within the 10-hour weekly budget.
